homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends a strong electronic influence with dark, ominous undertones to create a suspenseful atmosphere. A pulsating bassline and haunting synth melody drive the slow, hypnotic rhythm that feels perfect for a cinematic or game sound design context. The piece draws upon experimental noise aesthetics, utilizing synthesizers and subtle percussion to maintain an eerie and mysterious vibe throughout.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental techno track features a fast-paced rhythm driven by a powerful kick drum and deep, resonant synth bass. A loud synthesizer lead creates an energetic and intense atmosphere that feels perfect for the soundtrack of a video game or movie scene. The overall sound is futuristic and driving, suitable for high-energy settings like club environments or dangerous chases.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition highlights the interplay between a guitar and piano, where arpeggiated guitar patterns build tension alongside steady, slow drumming. The piano contributes a series of chords that create a melancholic and introspective mood, fitting for a dramatic scene or moment of reflection. Although electronic synthesizers appear in the broader musical metadata, this specific segment relies on acoustic textures to convey a sense of mystery and anticipation.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track is a fast-paced, percussion-driven piece characterized by its loud and intense nature. The driving rhythm creates a chaotic, frantic mood filled with urgency, making it ideal for high-energy activities like workouts or action sequences. Despite the heavy sound and rapid tempo, the composition functions as an aggressive backdrop rather than a melodic song.

questions.caption: This instrumental track features a repetitive, catchy melody driven by a synthesizer and a strong beat that creates an energetic dance club atmosphere. Although labeled as Latin reggaeton in external records, the segment's primary character is an upbeat rhythm perfect for parties or retro video game soundtracks. The medium tempo ensures the music remains lively and engaging throughout the clip.

The music blends deep house elements with a sporty summer vibe to fuel high-energy dance party settings.

questions.name: Sample 11
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental composition blends a keyboard and string section with a choir to create a dark, mysterious atmosphere suitable for film soundtracks. The slow tempo allows listeners to immerse themselves in the grandeur of the music, while the dramatic mood evokes a sense of tension or foreboding. Although similar tracks often feature harp or mallet percussion, this piece relies on the synthesized strings and vocal depth to build its suspenseful narrative.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
